query: direct on-camera flash snapshot harsh shadow red eye unflattering party
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: harsh flash — direct on-camera flash, red-eye, party snapshot aesthetic, hard shadows, unflattering documentary realism

response.objective_caption: A person with shoulder-length auburn hair wearing a white top looks toward the camera while standing beside a black LumiQuest camera flash accessory mounted on a stand, against a plain light-colored background.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A person with shoulder-length auburn hair wearing a white top looks toward the camera while standing beside a black LumiQuest camera flash accessory, but harsh flash lighting severely overexposes their face and shoulder, blowing out skin tones and erasing facial detail against the plain background.
